de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation

Interface TacletFormula

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AssumptionFormula, LemmaFormula

    public interface TacletFormula
    Represents the formula of a taclet.
    It provides methods to get the formula and its corresponding taclet.
    The setting of the formula and the taclet is dedicated to the constructor of the implementing class. This ensures that the relationship between both is not changed afterwards.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Term getFormula(TermServices services) 
      Collection<Term> getInstantiations()
      It can be that a taclet is translated into several formulas, i.e. in the case that the generics are instantiated.
      String getStatus() 
      Taclet getTaclet() 

    • Method Detail

      • getTaclet

        Taclet getTaclet()
        Returns:
        the taclet of the instance.

      • getFormula

        Term getFormula(TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        the formula of the instance if the taclet is translatable otherwise null. If the translation of the taclet consists of several instantiations (e.g. the taclet has some generic sorts) the returned term is a conjunction of these instantiations.

      • getStatus

        String getStatus()
        Returns:
        if the taclet can not be translated the reason why. Otherwise a empty string.

      • getInstantiations

        Collection<Term> getInstantiations()
        It can be that a taclet is translated into several formulas, i.e. in the case that the generics are instantiated. This method returns the set of resulting formulas.
